option.source: @{select QTD , QTD_NM from ibs.T9_YEAR_Q order by QTD}
option.label: QTD_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct BRANCH_ORG_ID , BRANCH_ORG_NM from IBS.T5_ORG where BRANCH_ORG_ID='#BRANCH_ORG_ID#' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' order by BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

select.value: Select bra.YEAR ,bra.EXAM_Q ,bra.EXAM_Q as EXAM_Q_PARM ,bra.BRANCH_ORG_ID ,bra.BRANCH_ORG_NM ,bra.PROJCT_NM ,bra.ZB_NM ,bra.SCORE ,bra.EFF_FLAG ,bra.MODIFY_PEOPLE ,bra.MODIFY_TIME ,bra.MODIFY_IP ,bra.VERIFY_TIME ,bra.VERIFY_PEOPLE ,bra.REMARK ,bra.STUS ,bra.MEASURE_DT ,bra.ISOVER from IBS.T3_BRANCH_DX_ZB bra inner join (select distinct BRANCH_ORG_ID, HEAD_ORG_ID from ibs.T5_ORG where ORG_TYPE_ID='EO') ou on ou.BRANCH_ORG_ID=bra.BRANCH_ORG_ID where {#condition#} and bra.EFF_FLAG='1' and bra.STUS='3' ORDER by bra.YEAR DESC,bra.EXAM_Q DESC,bra.BRANCH_ORG_ID,bra.PROJCT_NM,bra.ZB_NM,bra.VERIFY_TIME

option.source: @{select QTD , QTD_NM from ibs.T9_YEAR_Q order by QTD}
option.label: QTD_NM

option.source: @{SELECT DISTINCT BRANCH_ORG_ID , CASE WHEN ORG_LEVEL_ID='2' THEN BRANCH_ORG_NM ELSE BRANCH_ORG_NM||'机关' END AS BRANCH_ORG_NM FROM IBS.T5_ORG WHERE ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' AND ORG_LEVEL_ID IN ('2','3') and (ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#' or HEAD_ORG_ID='#ORG_ID0#') ORDER BY BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

button.name: subButn
button.label: 选中提交
button.confirmessage: 提交后数据将不能修改，是否确认提交?

button.name: overButn
button.label: 设置结束
button.confirmessage: 结束后数据将不能修改，是否确认结束?

option.source: @{select QTD , QTD_NM from ibs.T9_YEAR_Q order by QTD}
option.label: QTD_NM

option.source: @{Select distinct BRANCH_ORG_ID , BRANCH_ORG_NM from IBS.T5_ORG where BRANCH_ORG_ID='#BRANCH_ORG_ID#' and ORG_TYPE_ID='EO' order by BRANCH_ORG_ID}
option.label: BRANCH_ORG_NM

select.value: Select YEAR ,EXAM_Q ,EXAM_Q as EXAM_Q_PARM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,PROJCT_NM ,ZB_NM ,SCORE ,EFF_FLAG ,MODIFY_PEOPLE ,MODIFY_TIME ,MODIFY_IP ,VERIFY_TIME ,VERIFY_PEOPLE ,REMARK ,STUS ,MEASURE_DT ,VER_REMARK ,ISOVER from IBS.T3_BRANCH_DX_ZB where {#condition#} and EFF_FLAG='1' ORDER by YEAR DESC,EXAM_Q DESC,BRANCH_ORG_ID,PROJCT_NM,STUS DESC,ZB_NM

option.source: @{select QTD , QTD_NM from ibs.T9_YEAR_Q order by QTD}
option.label: QTD_NM

select.value: Select YEAR ,EXAM_Q,EXAM_Q as EXAM_Q_PARM ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,PROJCT_NM ,ZB_NM ,SCORE ,EFF_FLAG ,MODIFY_PEOPLE ,MODIFY_TIME ,MODIFY_IP ,VERIFY_TIME ,VERIFY_PEOPLE ,REMARK ,STUS ,VER_REMARK from IBS.T3_BRANCH_DX_ZB where {#condition#} and STUS in ('1','3') and EFF_FLAG='1' ORDER by YEAR DESC,EXAM_Q DESC,BRANCH_ORG_ID,PROJCT_NM,ZB_NM

option.source: @{select QTD , QTD_NM from ibs.T9_YEAR_Q order by QTD}
option.label: QTD_NM

button.name: button1
sub
button.label: 选中通过
button.confirmessage: 提交后数据将不能修改，是否确认提交?

report.footer: *审核不通过需逐条处理，并输入不通过理由。

inputbox.jsvalidate: isNotEmpty(审核不通过的理由为必输项)

select.value: Select YEAR ,EXAM_Q ,BRANCH_ORG_ID ,BRANCH_ORG_NM ,PROJCT_NM ,ZB_NM ,SCORE ,EFF_FLAG ,MODIFY_PEOPLE ,MODIFY_TIME ,MODIFY_IP ,VERIFY_TIME ,VERIFY_PEOPLE ,REMARK ,STUS ,VER_REMARK from IBS.T3_BRANCH_DX_ZB where {#condition#} and STUS='1' ORDER by YEAR DESC,EXAM_Q DESC,BRANCH_ORG_ID,PROJCT_NM,ZB_NM

button.name: button2
button.label: 提交
button.confirmessage: 提交后数据将不能修改，是否确认提交?
